patterns.description: Node child_process.execFile calling Python script fails when Python prints non-JSON to stdout before the JSON result
patterns.trigger: JSON.parse fails on publisher output with 'Unexpected token' error
patterns.fix: Ensure Python script only outputs the final JSON.dumps() to stdout. Use stderr for debug logging. In Node, try/catch JSON.parse on stdout.

patterns.description: Claude Code session sets empty ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env, dotenv doesn't override existing vars by default
patterns.trigger: API calls fail with invalid API key despite correct .env file
patterns.fix: Use require('dotenv').config({ override: true, path: ... }) in all scripts

patterns.description: Official apify/facebook-ads-scraper actor gets rate-limited/blocked by Meta's API
patterns.trigger: Apify scrape returns 0 results or times out on Meta Ad Library

patterns.description: OpenAI Whisper has a 25MB file size limit for audio/video uploads
patterns.trigger: Whisper transcription fails with file size error
patterns.fix: Wrap video transcription in isolated try-catch; fall back to text data (body copy, headline) when video fails

patterns.description: ICP names containing '/' create invalid filesystem paths when used in filenames
patterns.trigger: ENOENT error when writing generated content files with ICP name in path
patterns.fix: Sanitize ICP names with .replace(/[\/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '-') before using in filenames
